case_title: PAYTON, EZRA VS ASIAN NEIGHBORHOOD DESIGN INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PAYTON, EZRA AS TO DEFENDANT ASIAN NEIGHBORHOOD DESIGN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO GRANT DINH AGENT FOR SERVICE ASIAN NEIGHBORHOOD DESIGN INC RETURNED SIGNED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAYTON, EZRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASIAN NEIGHBORHOOD DESIGN INC. $475.93 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $507.93, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE. SECTION 28 OF THE UNION POLICY ABOUT TOO/REPLACEMENT STATES, INPERHNENT PART.. THE INDIVIDUAL EMPLOYER SHALL PROVIDE A REASONBLY SERVE PLACE WHERE EMPLOYEES MAY KEEP THEIR TOOLS. IN DEFT'S 1/10/05 LETTER TO JIM GOTHY,FIELD REP, DEFT'S EMPLOYEE STATES "AT ON TIME DID ME HAVE A LOCKED COMPARTMENT, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
